cases.title: System evaluates Eligible for Attended participant when feedback is optional in rule config
preconditions: Completed event with EventRuleConfig.feedbackRequired false
Registration in Attended state for valid participant
No Feedback row linked to registrationId
steps: Call evaluateEligibilityRules(registration, eventRuleConfig, feedback) with Attended registration and null feedback
cases.expected: System returns result Eligible with reasonCode ELIGIBLE and non-empty reasonText; optional feedback policy from configured rules does not block certificate eligibility per Workflow E step 3

cases.title: System evaluates Eligible when mandatory feedback configured and participant submitted feedback
preconditions: Completed event with EventRuleConfig.feedbackRequired true
Registration in Attended state
Feedback row exists linked to registrationId within configured window
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.evaluateOrGet(eventId, registrationId, systemContext)
Query certificate_eligibilities row by registrationId
cases.expected: System computes Eligible using attendance baseline (BR-17) and mandatory feedback completion (BR-18); persisted row stores Eligible with reasonCode, reasonText, and evaluatedAt per BR-19

cases.title: System evaluates NotEligible when mandatory feedback configured but not submitted
preconditions: Completed event with EventRuleConfig.feedbackRequired true
Registration in Attended state with no Feedback submission
Attendance finalization already applied
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.evaluateOrGet(eventId, registrationId, systemContext)
cases.expected: System returns NotEligible with reasonCode NOT_ELIGIBLE_FEEDBACK and explanatory reasonText; configured mandatory-feedback rule enforced per BR-14 and BR-18

cases.title: System persists eligibility evaluation and reason payload in one transaction
preconditions: Completed event with Attended registration meeting all configured rules
No prior certificate_eligibilities row for registrationId
Eligibility module transaction boundary enabled in test harness
steps: Trigger eligibility evaluation via eligibilityService.evaluateOrGet
Query certificate_eligibilities and verify row count in same transaction scope
cases.expected: Exactly one certificate_eligibilities row created atomically with terminal result, reasonCode, reasonText, and evaluatedAt; satisfies Eligibility Module cross-module transaction boundary per module breakdown section 4

cases.title: Flow A system evaluates certificate eligibility after feedback in full lifecycle
preconditions: E2E Flow A progressed through publish, registration, check-in, event completion, and feedback submission
Event configured with mandatory feedback via EventRuleConfig
Participant JWT from prior flow steps
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me with participant Authorization bearer token after feedback submit
Parse result, reasonCode, and reasonText fields
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with terminal result Eligible and non-empty reason fields; Flow A draft-to-eligibility path completes with system-evaluated outcome per testing plan Flow A and scenario matrix

cases.title: GET eligibility/me returns system-evaluated Eligible or NotEligible with reason
preconditions: Completed event with attendance finalized to Attended or Absent
Eligibility evaluation has run or is triggered on first query
Participant JWT for own registration
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me with participant bearer token
Verify response envelope fields
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with result Eligible or NotEligible (never PendingEvaluation in API response), reasonCode, reasonText, and evaluatedAt; FR-20 system evaluation exposed to participant self-service endpoint

cases.title: Certificate eligibility state machine transitions PendingEvaluation to Eligible on passAllRules
preconditions: CertificateEligibility aggregate in PendingEvaluation state
Registration Attended with all configured rules satisfied
passAllRules guard inputs available
steps: Apply passAllRules transition trigger with valid attendance and feedback inputs
Read resulting CertificateEligibility state
cases.expected: State transitions from PendingEvaluation to Eligible; passAllRules guard requires registered and attended plus feedback complete when mandatory per state machine section 3

cases.title: System reads EventRuleConfig feedbackRequired when evaluating eligibility
preconditions: Two Completed events: Event A with feedbackRequired true, Event B with feedbackRequired false
Identical Attended registrations without feedback for both events
steps: Evaluate eligibility for Event A registration
Evaluate eligibility for Event B registration with same attendance profile
cases.expected: Event A evaluates NotEligible (NOT_ELIGIBLE_FEEDBACK); Event B evaluates Eligible; system applies per-event configured business rules not a global default

cases.title: Participant sees system-evaluated eligibility result with reason after Flow 5
preconditions: Participant logged in with Attended registration on Completed event
Feedback submitted when mandatory or window open when optional
Participation history or event detail exposes eligibility result panel
steps: Navigate to event detail or participation history eligibility section
Observe displayed eligibility status and reason text after system evaluation
cases.expected: UI shows terminal Eligible or NotEligible with human-readable reason per Flow 5 step 5; not stuck in PendingEvaluation after system runs configured rules

cases.title: System evaluates Absent registration as NotEligible with attendance reason
preconditions: Completed event with any feedback configuration
Registration in Absent state after event completion finalization
Feedback may or may not exist
steps: Call evaluateEligibilityRules with Absent registration state and present or absent feedback
cases.expected: System returns NotEligible with reasonCode NOT_ELIGIBLE_ATTENDANCE; attendance baseline rule fails regardless of feedback per BR-17

cases.title: System evaluation order checks attendance before mandatory feedback rule
preconditions: Event with feedbackRequired true in EventRuleConfig
Registration not in Attended state (e.g. Absent or Registered)
No feedback submitted
steps: Call evaluateEligibilityRules with non-Attended registration and null feedback
cases.expected: System returns NotEligible with reasonCode NOT_ELIGIBLE_ATTENDANCE (not NOT_ELIGIBLE_FEEDBACK); deterministic fixed rule evaluation order per validation rules section 5

cases.title: System re-evaluates and updates stored result when feedback submitted after initial NotEligible
preconditions: Completed event with mandatory feedback and Attended participant
Initial evaluation returned NotEligible due to missing feedback
Participant subsequently submits feedback within window
steps: Trigger initial eligibility evaluation (observe NotEligible)
Submit feedback via feedbackService.submit
Trigger eligibility evaluation again
cases.expected: Second evaluation returns Eligible and persists updated certificate_eligibilities row with new evaluatedAt; system refreshes outcome when configured rule inputs change

cases.title: System does not evaluate Cancelled registration as Eligible
preconditions: Completed event with mandatory feedback submitted
Registration in CancelledByUser or CancelledByOrganizer terminal state
steps: Attempt eligibilityService.evaluateOrGet for cancelled registrationId
cases.expected: Evaluation returns NotEligible or NOT_FOUND equivalent; valid registration baseline per BR-17 excludes cancelled registrations from Eligible outcome

cases.title: System defers eligibility evaluation until event Completed and attendance finalized
preconditions: Event still InProgress or registration not yet finalized to Attended/Absent
Participant may have submitted feedback prematurely or registration still CheckedIn
steps: Attempt eligibilityService.evaluateOrGet before event completion and attendance finalization
cases.expected: Evaluation not finalized to terminal Eligible/NotEligible; returns guard error or PendingEvaluation without premature Eligible outcome per domain lifecycle semantics

cases.title: Concurrent system eligibility evaluations produce single consistent persisted result
preconditions: Completed event with Attended participant meeting all configured rules
No prior certificate_eligibilities row
Two parallel evaluateOrGet calls for same registrationId
steps: Launch two concurrent eligibility evaluation requests with identical inputs
Query certificate_eligibilities rows after both settle
cases.expected: Exactly one persisted eligibility row; both calls return same terminal result and reasonCode; no conflicting duplicate evaluation records

cases.title: System eligibility rule evaluation is deterministic for identical inputs
preconditions: Fixed registration, EventRuleConfig, and feedback fixtures
Deterministic test controls with fixed clock per testing plan section 7
steps: Run evaluateEligibilityRules twice with identical inputs
Compare result, reasonCode, and reasonText across both runs
cases.expected: Both invocations return identical terminal result and reason fields; satisfies validation rules section 5 determinism requirements and scenario matrix 'deterministic with reason'

cases.title: Eligibility evaluation and result persistence are atomic within one transaction
preconditions: Integration test harness with transaction rollback or failure injection capability
Completed event with Attended registration eligible under configured rules
steps: Trigger eligibility evaluation that fails mid-persist (simulated DB constraint or rollback)
Query certificate_eligibilities for registrationId
cases.expected: No partial eligibility row persisted on failure; evaluation outcome and persistence succeed or fail together per Eligibility Module transaction boundary

cases.title: Every system evaluation output includes reasonCode and reasonText per INV-05
preconditions: Completed events covering Eligible and NotEligible outcomes
Mix of optional and mandatory feedback configurations
steps: Evaluate eligibility for Eligible Attended case with optional feedback
Evaluate eligibility for NotEligible Absent case
Evaluate eligibility for NotEligible missing mandatory feedback case
Inspect each persisted EligibilityReason payload
cases.expected: All terminal outputs include non-empty reasonCode and reasonText; never returns result without reason; satisfies INV-05 and BR-19 eligibility reason requirement

cases.title: System emits EligibilityEvaluated domain event on successful evaluation
preconditions: Completed event with Attended registration meeting configured rules
Domain event listener or outbox capture enabled in test harness
steps: Trigger eligibility evaluation via eligibilityService.evaluateOrGet
Inspect emitted domain events or outbox records
cases.expected: EligibilityEvaluated event recorded with eventId, registrationId, result, reasonCode, and evaluatedAt; enables downstream audit and organizer reporting per domain model section 5
